hooks.command: bash -c 'echo ""; echo "═══ EROS IDENTITY ═══"; PFILE="/c/Users/mateo/Desktop/Eros/.eros/memory/design-intelligence/personality.json"; if [ -f "$PFILE" ]; then node -e "const p=JSON.parse(require(\"fs\").readFileSync(\"$PFILE\",\"utf8\"));console.log(\"Voice:\",p.voice?.tone);console.log(\"Philosophy:\",p.voice?.philosophy);console.log(\"Values:\",(p.values?.core||[]).map(v=>v.value).join(\", \"))" 2>/dev/null; fi; echo ""; echo "═══ ACTIVE PROJECTS ═══"; found=0; for f in /c/Users/mateo/Desktop/*/.brain/state.md; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then proj=$(dirname $(dirname "$f")); echo ""; echo "Project: $(basename $proj)"; cat "$f"; found=1; fi; done; if [ $found -eq 0 ]; then echo "No active projects."; fi; echo "═══════════════════════"'

bash -c 'echo ""; echo "═══ EROS ═══"; PFILE="/c/Users/mateo/Desktop/Eros/.eros/memory/design-intelligence/personality.json"; if [ -f "$PFILE" ]; then node -e "const p=JSON.parse(require(\"fs\").readFileSync(\"$PFILE\",\"utf8\"));console.log(\"Voice:\",p.voice?.tone);console.log(\"Philosophy:\",p.voice?.philosophy)" 2>/dev/null; fi; for f in /c/Users/mateo/Desktop/*/.brain/state.md; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then proj=$(dirname $(dirname "$f")); echo ""; echo "═══ $(basename $proj) ═══"; cat "$f"; echo "═══════════════════════"; fi; done'

bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "/src/" && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "_project-scaffold"; then DOCS_DIR=$(echo "$FILE" | sed "s|/src/.*|/docs/|"); if [ ! -f "${DOCS_DIR}tokens.md" ] || [ ! -d "${DOCS_DIR}pages" ]; then echo ""; echo "[V5 GATE] Design docs missing. Run Designer teammate first."; echo "  Required: docs/tokens.md + docs/pages/*.md"; fi; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; BLOCKED=false; MSG=""; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.brain/(state\.md|state\.json|queue\.md|queue\.json)$"; then BLOCKED=true; MSG="Use eros-state.mjs instead of writing directly to state/queue files."; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.brain/approvals\.md$"; then BLOCKED=true; MSG="Use eros-log.mjs approve/flag instead of writing directly to approvals.md."; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.brain/decisions\.md$"; then BLOCKED=true; MSG="Use eros-log.mjs decision instead of writing directly to decisions.md."; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "design-intelligence/.*\.(json|md)$" && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "Eros/scripts/"; then BLOCKED=true; MSG="Use eros-memory.mjs learn instead of writing directly to design-intelligence files."; fi; if [ "$BLOCKED" = true ]; then echo ""; echo "[EROS ENFORCE] BLOCKED: $MSG"; echo "  File: $FILE"; echo "  These files are owned by eros-* scripts. Run the appropriate script."; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.vue$"; then ISSUES=""; grep -q "import axios" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ISSUES="$ISSUES
  - AXIOS direct import: use service layer"; grep -qE "gsap\.(to|from|fromTo).*?(width|height|top|left|right|bottom)[^T]" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ISSUES="$ISSUES
  - Animating layout property: use transform/opacity only"; grep -qE "will-change" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ISSUES="$ISSUES
  - will-change detected: remove preventive usage"; if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then echo ""; echo "[ANTI-PATTERN]"; echo -e "$ISSUES"; fi; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.brain/reports/S-.*\.md$"; then HAS_SCREENSHOT=$(grep -ciE "screenshot|desktop.*mobile|mobile.*desktop|preview_screenshot" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); HAS_SCORE=$(grep -ciE "score|excellence standard" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$HAS_SCREENSHOT" -eq 0 ] || [ "$HAS_SCORE" -eq 0 ]; then echo ""; echo "[PREVIEW LOOP] Builder report missing preview loop evidence."; [ "$HAS_SCREENSHOT" -eq 0 ] && echo "  - No screenshot/viewport mentions found"; [ "$HAS_SCORE" -eq 0 ] && echo "  - No quality scoring mentions found"; fi; fi'
